problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
